title: ConvertKit vs Beehiiv (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and Beehiiv. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email platform suits your needs best.
h1: ConvertKit vs Beehiiv: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and Beehiiv are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different creator types. ConvertKit focuses on creators, bloggers, and course sellers with commerce capabilities, while Beehiiv emphasizes newsletter publishers and media operators with monetization features. Choosing between them depends on your primary goal: selling products or building a sustainable newsletter business.
choose_a_if: You sell digital products, courses, or physical goods through your email list
You want the lowest entry price for paid plans starting at just $29/month
You need comprehensive automation with visual workflow builders
choose_b_if: You prioritize newsletter monetization through ads and sponsorships
You want a larger free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers
You need advanced analytics and audience segmentation for growth optimization

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv has higher user ratings and stronger monetization features for newsletters, while ConvertKit excels at e-commerce integration and selling digital products. ConvertKit is ideal for course creators; Beehiiv is better for independent newsletter publishers.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Beehiiv?
faq.a: ConvertKit's paid plans start at $29/month versus Beehiiv's $39/month, making ConvertKit $10 cheaper monthly. However, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers compared to ConvertKit's 1,000, so Beehiiv may keep you on the free plan longer and ultimately save you money.

faq.q: Can I switch from Beehiiv to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists, though the process varies. ConvertKit provides import tools for migrating lists, and Beehiiv supports standard export formats. You'll want to plan your migration carefully to avoid losing subscriber data or email history.
